description: README opening with value and the shortest path to success
input:
# Geared Pagination

Paginate Active Record sets at variable speeds — more records per page as you go deeper.

Works out of the box with Rails. Two helpers, no configuration required.

```ruby
# controller
def index
  set_page_and_extract_portion_from Post.ordered
end
```

That's it. Add `gem 'geared_pagination'` to your Gemfile and you're done.
